violations.text: Weiner sauce, which was previously cooked and cooled, was not reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food that is cooked, cooled, and reheated for hot holding must be reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

Rice pudding and cookies packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Items were removed from self-service refrigerator. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025
Food observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025
Single service items observed stored on the floor in the back area of the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: cold drawer unit, including the top which is beneath the flattop grill cart mixer blender base flour bin sugar bin food scale prep unit freezer refrigerator, including the door tracks. New Violation. Correct By: 12/02/2025
The kitchen floor is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility including the walk in cooler floor have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The exhaust fan and wall have an accumulation of black grime. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back kitchen. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2025
The floor in the kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025

The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024

Staff member observed eating in the front food prep area, then observed again eating while preparing food. Food safety plan states employees will eat only in dining room. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Beef was placed hot in the refrigerator in plastic covered container greater than four inches deep. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024
Food observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024

Tomatoes were not washed before being cut. Raw fruits and vegetables must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the food prep area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit, and refrigerator including door tracks, have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024

The pipe at the grease trap is in poor repair, with contaminated liquid pooling on the floor in the corner. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2024

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2024
The kitchen floor is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2025
